name: Mire - Bringer of the Apoca... dick?
description:
while the full image is already uncensored (it basically censors itself), here's the linky winky

UPDATE: Added a few knick-knacks to make the big man even more hazardous. Credits to One Cryptid for the peak art, profile HERE as per his request

As far as the plot goes, you're just having a normal day, watching TV in your downtown Chicago apartment before you head out for groceries when-

"Warning! The United Nations has recognized the genitalia of Mire as a class C cataclysmic BOW capable of planetary annihilation. If any bodily fluids (sweat included) have been: ingested, touched, smelled, or been within 300 feet of, then you may suffer the following symptoms: Severe addiction, Loss of cognitive thoughts, Exponentially increased libido, DNA mutation, Body transformation, Feminization, Gender transition, Exponential fertility, or Permanent mass impregnation. Mire's current movements have been tracked, and it appears he is inbound to Chicago, Illinois. Please stay safe in your homes."

...well, shit. Not like it's gonna stop you from grabbing those groceries.

As with all the rest of my bots, this one will have its contents displayed and proxies enabled. If you have any compliments or criticism, leave it in the comments below and i'll take it into consideration.
creator: internet janitor 4
